TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Danny Aiello III kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 1, Danny Aiello III, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Danny Aiello hiya yaba nya, squilq psibay pincyogan nya. 2010 kawas 5 byacing 1 ryax, Danny Aiello III tlu 胰腺癌 (yaqeh nbu na gang) wal mhuqil la (53 kawas), maki Hillsdale, New Jersey . maki yaya yaba ru cyugal mtswe nya. cyux bes nya ru sazing kneril laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *annj aiello iii kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *annj aiello iii, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *annj aiello ħija jaβa nja, s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax, *annj aiello iii tlu *** (jaqeħ nβu na ɣaŋ) wal mħuqil la (** kawas~ɕ), maki ħills~ɕ*ale, new *ers~ɕej . maki jaja jaβa ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal mts~ɕwe nja. ʦ~ʨjux βes~ɕ nja ru s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Danny Aiello III kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 1, Danny Aiello III, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Danny Aiello hiya yaba nya, squilq psibay pincyogan nya. 2010 kawas 5 byacing 1 ryax, Danny Aiello III tlu 胰腺癌 (yaqeh nbu na gang) wal mhuqil la (53 kawas), maki Hillsdale, New Jersey . maki yaya yaba ru cyugal mtswe nya. cyux bes nya ru sazing kneril laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
